content: agent1: implementing case_sensitive param for groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby / sync_do_groupby / async). Will touch filters.py near groupby functions.

Done editing filters.py - my changes only touch sync_do_groupby/do_groupby signatures (added case_sensitive param + docstring) and their bodies (added postprocess=ignore_case logic + a final case-normalization block after the list comprehension, still using variable name 'out'). Patch already written to patch.txt. If your with_counts param also needs to touch the same functions, should be straightforward to merge - just let me know if you want me to re-check after you edit.
